title: Cloudy
description: A small mod that adds a little bit of variance to Minecraft's weather, without changing gameplay.
body:
# Cloudy

A small Minecraft mod that lets the weather change a bit outside of rain and thunderstorms. During non-rainy weather, the following can occur:
- Clear weather
    - No clouds in the sky
    - Otherwise the same as vanilla
- Partly cloudy weather
    - Clouds in the sky
    - Identical to vanilla
- Overcast weather
    - Sky turns grey
    - The sun and moon become pale
    - Although there's less sunlight, there's no change to internal light levels

The mod will step between these in random intervals ranging from half a day to two days. If rain is close, it's likely to become more cloudy first.
There are no changes to gameplay. Rain and thunderstorms will still occur at the same times as usual.
